authority.guard_rule_or_property: adapter failure rollback
authority.authority_text_preserved_nonexecutable: inject failure at every adapter construction step
authority.ratified_rule: Owned construction, Dyn packing, owned recovery, and adapter creation use PREPARE, VALIDATE, COMMIT. Before commit, failure returns the exact original owner after all temporary state is discharged. After commit, the package has the sole owner and the operation cannot report a recoverable original-owner result. The prepare-to-commit interval is nonsuspending, cancellation-masked, and nonreentrant.
